narrative: A soft US CPI report and Fed Chair Warsh's inflation comments spark a broad risk-on rally, sending DXY lower -0.42% as US yields retreat. The Canadian Dollar climbs to a four-week high with USD/CAD falling to 1.4060, while AUD/USD surges to 0.6979 on the back of the US inflation miss. Cross-asset flows reflect the risk-on shift as gold rises +1.93% near $4,083, equities firm +0.32%, and the VIX drops 16.4. Watch the Bank of Canada rate decision tomorrow at 13:00 UTC for the next major G10 policy catalyst.
